export_policy.analysis_layer: dashboard uses all calibration rows including old_pool for historical/regime research
export_policy.pricing_surface_layer: exported surface uses current_pool + market_history only, max 3 months
export_policy.no_correction_rule: If no same/template/theme data exists within 3 months, m8_batch should set beta=0 and Final Fair=New Fair.
export_policy.formula: Final Fair = New Fair + beta * (Surface Market Coupon - New Fair)
